components.name: Command Center (engine)
components.summary: The platform web control plane: a single stdlib-Python HTTP server (server.py) with an embedded vanilla-JS single-page frontend. Serves the dashboard on this node's port, is self-locating/portable via cc.config.json, and houses the whole platform (mesh, superadmin, Google, deliverables, agents, extensions, Ralph, browser terminal). Runs under a tmux-supervised session (name from cc.config); edits require a restart.

components.name: Engine helpers
components.summary: Stdlib helpers beside server.py: granola.py (Calls engine), ralph_runner.py (loop runner), mesh_stop_hook.py (deterministic mesh reply forwarding), scan_projects.py, cc-session-watchdog.py, git-backup.sh + git-backup-secretscan.py, cc-task, cc-supervise.sh, cc-launch.sh.

components.name: Presets & roles
components.summary: Role-tier lens/agent bundles. project.json = ClaudeFather (role project, ~24-lens single-project surface, lands Sessions); overseer.json = ClaudeGrandfather (role org, portfolio/overseer, lands Portfolio). server.py loads presets/<PRESET>.json and applyPreset() filters the nav. Framework files (FW_FINGERPRINT_FILES) — change at Mission Control, ship via dist/cc-update.

components.name: Mesh, Superadmin & Multi-Node
components.summary: Asymmetric-authority fleet layer over Tailscale (all in server.py + mesh_stop_hook.py): peer roster (peers.json), durable chief-to-chief mesh queue with Stop-hook reply forwarding, tiered auth (MESH_TOKEN family badge + SUPERADMIN master), Ed25519/HMAC signed superadmin grants running only allowlisted actions, CCR pipeline (nodes propose, MC builds/ships), and sha256 framework-drift fingerprinting. Governance flows DOWN, observability/CCRs roll UP; fixed 3-level ORG->PROJECT->MODULE nested oversight.

components.name: Storage & data
components.summary: Storage architecture: per-node dedicated APFS SSD with the macOS home on it; storage_mode (github/icloud/icloud+github); /api/doctor flags internal-disk drift; deliverables routing precedence (explicit deliverables_root SSD store overrides iCloud tiered which overrides self-contained default); per-node _*.json state in STATE_DIR; data/ symlinked to the SSD. cc.config.json is the portability boundary.

components.name: Installer
components.summary: Packaged install entry point: install.sh bootstrap, AGENT_INSTALL.md agent playbook, README_INSTALL.md human intro. Scaffolds a node that then runs the root lifecycle scripts.

components.name: Lifecycle scripts
components.summary: Framework-root lifecycle: cc-init.sh (scaffold + write cc.config.json), cc-update.sh (overlay framework_paths, never touch preserve_paths, splice CC:NOTES, chmod-600 secrets), cc-spawn.sh / cc-promote.sh (nested child instances), cc-recover.sh (break-glass PIN/port/URL), make-install-package.sh (dist zip), brain.sh (operator session).

components.name: Ship manifest
components.summary: Single source of truth for updates: splits generic FRAMEWORK paths (ship + propagate) from per-deployment PRESERVE paths (config/data/secrets/state, never overwritten), plus CC:NOTES preserve-region markers. Updates flow dev->fleet via cc-update against the private core repo or the public claudesole-dist mirror.

components.name: Provisioning — Add a ClaudeFather
components.summary: How a new instance is born: the overseer Portfolio "➕ Add a ClaudeFather" wizard -> POST /api/instance-provision (instance_provision() in server.py, org-only) -> the deterministic engine cc-newinstance.sh, which builds a self-contained, PORTABLE bundle (one movable folder: full framework + its own cc.config.json/secrets/state/project/deliverables). Mints a fresh dashboard auth token, carries the FAMILY mesh token (joins the mesh), ships superadmin.pub (never the private key), stages a launchd plist, makes a starter project tree, and registers the node in _instances.json so it appears in Portfolio. Nothing starts until approved: preview (--dry-run) -> stage -> launch (on the brain tmux server, verified) -> persist (per-user launchd) -> mesh. cc-instance-supervise.sh derives its own bundle dir so a relocated bundle runs its OWN server.py. Charter: agents/provision/CLAUDE.md; full doc: docs/PROVISIONING.md.

components.name: Marketplace catalog
components.summary: The installable-extension catalog. Each subdir has a required extension.json (catalog card + trigger) and SETUP.md (guided setup-agent script). Five category mechanics wired in server.py (~L2567-2806): integration (mcp.json merge), agent-tool (payload->AGENTS_DIR), skill (payload->~/.claude/skills), theme (theme.css), agency/lens. Catalog is framework; install state per-deployment in _extensions.json; secrets in .env.claudefather/secrets/. On a node, new/edited extensions route via CCR.

children.name: github
children.summary: Integration: GitHub repos/issues/PRs/CI via official GitHub MCP (remote OAuth or local PAT).

children.name: atlassian-jira-confluence
children.summary: Integration: Jira issues + Confluence pages (Atlassian Cloud) via MCP.

children.name: aws
children.summary: Integration: query AWS resources + docs, read-first, via MCP.

children.name: brave-search
children.summary: Integration: live privacy-respecting web search via Brave's independent index.

children.name: cloudflare
children.summary: Integration: manage Cloudflare Workers, DNS, KV/R2, analytics via MCP.

children.name: figma
children.summary: Integration: read Figma files/components/frames for design-to-code; endpoint unconfirmed so wired at setup (no mcp.json auto-wire).

children.name: filesystem
children.summary: Integration: scoped, read-controlled file operations over a chosen directory.

children.name: google-workspace
children.summary: Integration + agent: headless Path-B Google OAuth minting/storing a refresh token for one controlled account (secrets/tokens/<account>.json). Two consumers: server.py's GOOGLE WORKSPACE block calls Gmail/Calendar/Drive REST directly for live lenses + VoiceMatch + Tasks; the agents/google power-agent uses the self-hosted workspace_mcp. Draft-first email; secrets gitignored + excluded from cc-update. Ships bin/gauth.sh, mint_token.py, verify.py.

children.name: linear
children.summary: Integration: read/manage Linear issues, projects, cycles via MCP.

children.name: notion
children.summary: Integration: read/write Notion pages and databases via MCP.

children.name: pagerduty
children.summary: Integration: read incidents + on-call schedules, ack/resolve with approval, via MCP.

children.name: playwright-browser
children.summary: Integration: drive a real browser (navigate/click/fill/screenshot) for testing + web automation.

children.name: postgres-supabase
children.summary: Integration: read-only-by-default SQL against Postgres/Supabase via MCP.

children.name: sentry
children.summary: Integration: surface production errors + issues from Sentry via MCP.

children.name: slack
children.summary: Integration: post to + read from Slack channels via MCP.

children.name: stripe
children.summary: Integration: look up Stripe customers, subscriptions, invoices, refunds, read-first.

children.name: telegram-notify
children.summary: Integration: two-way Telegram (push notifications + chat to agents); ships notify.py as a standalone callable payload for loops/cron.

children.name: incident-commander
children.summary: Agent-tool: capstone agent triaging Sentry + PagerDuty + logs into one ranked posture; degrades to logs-only.

children.name: web-research
children.summary: Skill: guided deep-research workflow (fan-out search, verify sources, cited synthesis); payload copied into ~/.claude/skills.

children.name: theme-claudefather-dark
children.summary: Theme: dark high-contrast ClaudeFather palette (theme.css scoped to data-theme); cosmetic, no data/secrets.

children.name: granola
children.summary: Agency/Calls lens: turns Granola meeting transcripts into REVIEWED updates via a propose->approve->apply spine (engine command-center/granola.py). On approve, appends a dated entry to the matched client's CLAUDE.md (CC:CALLS region) + creates tasks/reminders. Headless claude -p extraction; state in _granola.json.

components.name: Scoped agents roster
components.summary: The agent-tool roster: each subdir is one scoped human-facing capability with a CLAUDE.md charter, optional tools/run.py check-suite, per-deployment config.json, and reports/. Auto-discovered by server.py (any dir with CLAUDE.md) and rendered in the Agents lens with zero per-agent frontend code. Common report schema + RAG rollup. Read-only/human-gated by default; delete-means-archive.

children.name: backup
children.summary: Additive-only git backup agent: keeps the project pushed to its private GitHub repo, verifies pushes, enforces .gitignore hygiene. Engine = git-backup.sh + a 4h launchd job. Never destructive/force-push.

children.name: cost
children.summary: Read-only spend posture: tools/run.py reads config.json sources, compares to warn/err thresholds, writes the common report schema. Never calls a paid/billing API.

children.name: deploy
children.summary: Ship-readiness agent: tools/run.py health-checks targets + reports git cleanliness (read-only); tools/deploy.py --target X --yes is the human-gated executor. Never fires autonomously.

children.name: google
children.summary: Google Workspace power-agent driving live Gmail/Calendar/Drive MCP tools (brief/triage/schedule/Drive/client-comms). Read/draft-first: never sends, confirms before mutation. Needs Path B self-hosted MCP for headless; config.json maps clients to email domains.

children.name: ideas
children.summary: Idea inbox: capture verbatim, refine to a crisp scope, promote to a module note / new agent-tool / Ralph loop. Logic in server.py (idea_add/idea_promote, /api/idea*).

children.name: incidents
children.summary: Read-only open-incident posture: tools/run.py scans configured incident/error logs for open/critical patterns, writes the common report schema. Never edits or remediates.

children.name: provision
children.summary: The "Add a ClaudeFather" brain (overseer-level): turns a design plan into a new self-contained instance by driving the cc-newinstance.sh engine -- never hand-crafts layout. Runs the approval gates (stage -> launch -> launchd -> mesh), verifies the port, reports the new node's bundle/port/initial token. Inert on leaf project nodes. Full doc: docs/PROVISIONING.md.

children.name: routines
children.summary: Owns scheduled recurring jobs (the heartbeat). Currently a STUB: a _routines.json registry exists but no runner is wired; its first job is to build itself.

children.name: security
children.summary: Security posture auditor (project + AI-agent safety): tools/scan.py runs a read-only check suite (Secrets/Access/Deps/AI-safety/Network/Audit), writes reports in its own richer overall/checks[] schema with sev/dim. Tracks rotation_ledger.json + ROTATION_CHECKLIST.md; proposes irreversible fixes for human approval only.

children.name: setup
children.summary: New-instance onboarding: runs INSIDE a freshly-created node and walks the operator through configuring it (purpose -> project CLAUDE.md scaffold from a pasted spec -> agents -> extensions -> first goals -> hand off to the Chief). Provisioning already created/started/persisted/meshed the node; this is everything after. Idle on already-configured nodes; leaf-node domain only (platform changes -> CCR).

children.name: usage
children.summary: Token + cost analytics and token-waste detection from Claude Code transcripts. Aggregation in server.py (_scan_tok/token_totals/usage_payload, /api/usage), rendered in the Usage lens. Cost figures are estimates.

components.name: Platform docs
components.summary: Authoritative platform docs: PROVISIONING.md (how a new instance is born — the Add-a-ClaudeFather flow), SUPERADMIN.md (signed-grant authority model), NESTED_OVERSIGHT.md (3-level ORG->PROJECT->MODULE design), STORAGE_ARCHITECTURE.md (per-node SSD home standard), SMART_FILES.md (deliverables store), PACKAGING.md (dist/cc-update flow), MEMORY_SKILLS_AGENTS.md, SESSIONS_AND_SUDO.md (pre-typed admin-shell sudo protocol), AGENCY_INTEGRATION.md, CHANGELOG.md.
